name: hubspot
description: Manage contacts, companies, and deals in your HubSpot CRM

envVars.name: HUBSPOT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: HubSpot OAuth Client ID (from your app)

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List contacts from your HubSpot CRM

tools.name: Get Contact
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific contact

tools.name: Create Contact
tools.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM

tools.name: List Deals
tools.description: List sales deals from your HubSpot CRM

tools.name: Create Deal
tools.description: Create a new deal in HubSpot CRM

prompts.title: Find contacts
prompts.prompt: Search for contacts in my HubSpot CRM and show me their key information.

prompts.title: Create a contact
prompts.prompt: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM with the information I provide.

prompts.title: Pipeline summary
prompts.prompt: Show me a summary of my current sales deals and pipeline status.
